title: Microhabitat comparison and close-look phase
summary: Forty-first structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-2 follow-on lands after the reactivated microhabitat and archive wave: add one compact comparison-ready microhabitat set plus one or two close-look additions so the new spaces feel more distinct and collectible inside existing surfaces.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one microhabitat comparison and close-look follow-on pack.
execution_order.why_now: After density and archive payoff, the next content gain is stronger contrast and texture inside existing journal and inspect surfaces.

execution_order.goal: Implement the comparison and close-look pack.
execution_order.why_now: A few strong contrasts will make the new spaces teach more than a larger content swell would.

execution_order.goal: Review the microhabitat comparison and close-look pass.
execution_order.why_now: The lane should deepen place memory without drifting into systems or shell work.

guardrails: Reuse existing comparison and close-look surfaces.
Prefer a few strong contrasts over broad content swell.
Do not reopen route, traversal, or station runtime.
Unlock lingonberry comparison through one tiny tundra berry-note addition rather than broader comparison plumbing.
Keep the close-look additions to old-mans-beard plus woodpecker-cavity unless a tighter browser-fit check proves one of them unworkable.
acceptance_focus: At least one new microhabitat contrast reads clearly through existing journal or inspect seams.
One or two close-look additions make the spaces more collectible and distinct.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-2.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-microhabitat-comparison-and-close-look-phase.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-microhabitat-comparison-close-look-handoff.md, and this packet. Treat this as the lane-2 follow-on after the active microhabitat wave: make lingonberry comparison-ready with one tiny tundra note, then add old-mans-beard plus woodpecker-cavity as the only new close-look additions.
